verdict: A decently timed chart that suffers from inconsistent vocal rhythm quantization and several flow-breaking double steps.

issues.problem: Inconsistent rhythm mapping for the same vocal phrase. The first 'jiggle' uses a 0.346s (dotted eighth) gap, while the second uses a 0.231s (eighth note) gap, making the repetition feel off-sync and unintuitive.
The sequence 'U -> D -> L -> R -> U -> D' forces either rapid double-stepping on the same foot or highly awkward crossovers, breaking the natural dance flow.
A sudden 16th-note transition (L to R in 116ms) followed by a hold feels jarringly out of place compared to the surrounding slow tempo.
An awkward 16th-note transition from L to D forces an uncomfortable double-step with the left foot immediately before an 8th-note stream.
Cluttered hold and tap overlaps where a D tap is placed shortly after releasing a D hold, while simultaneously holding R. This creates a messy and physically awkward sequence.
